2026/05/18 19:05:09.301524289 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301544698 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301545549 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301584793 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301585915 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301606053 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301608958 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301623125 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301624167 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301638904 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301639756 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/18 19:05:09.301721590 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/18 19:05:09.301771281 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301772223 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301804854 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301805836 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301823870 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301824942 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/18 19:05:09.301864466 "default"))

2026/05/18 19:05:09.301881558 family <- family$metrics

2026/05/18 19:05:09.301335546 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301342238 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301373727 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301374980 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301396540 {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301397482 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301411849 new <- list()
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301412680 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301426746 new$width <- width
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301427628 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301442736 new$height <- height
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301443668 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301459778 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301460610 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301476390 new$title <- title
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301477311 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301507207 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301508169 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301523478 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301524289 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301544698 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301545549 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301584793 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301585915 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301606053 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301608958 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301623125 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301624167 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301638904 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301639756 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301656036 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301656818 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301687827 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301691915 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301720338 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301721590 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301747837 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301750462 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301771281 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301772223 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301804854 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301805836 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301823870 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301824942 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301846813 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301847765 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301863534 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301864466 "default"))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301880797 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301881558 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301895554 }
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301896436 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301910813 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301911654 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301925570 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301926392 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301940649 }
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301941450 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301954134 }
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301955016 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301973470 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301974572 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301990703 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/18 19:05:09.301991644 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302010029 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302011151 }
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302025448 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302026439 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302042169 }
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302043061 version <- old$version
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302055073 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302055985 "2.0")
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302066935 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302067657 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302081132 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302081923 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302095329 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302096120 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302117089 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302117891 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302132368 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302133310 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302153077 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302154009 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302172844 invisible()
2026/05/18 19:05:09.302173866 }
